## Deep Audit V2: hx-time-picker

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-time-picker` component. NOTE: This is one of 9 incomplete components (no index.ts) from the PR 175 rescue batch.

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Design Tokens** — All colors, spacing, typography use `--hx-*` tokens. No hardcoded values.
